title: 10 pts
content:
10 pts
Excellent
Submits initial post by deadline.
0 pts
Needs Improvement
Submits initial post late.
10 pts
This criterion is linked to a Learning OutcomeInitial Post: Spelling/Grammar/Mechanics
10 pts
Excellent
Post has 0-1 spelling or grammatical errors; Properly cites work in APA format where required.
5 pts
Satisfactory
Post has 2-3 spelling or grammatical errors; Cites work in APA format where required with few errors.
0 pts
Needs Improvement
Posts have 4 or more spelling or grammatical errors; Does not cite work where required.
10 pts
This criterion is linked to a Learning OutcomePeer Responses: Engagement/Classroom Interaction
30 to >20.0 pts
Excellent
Submits required number of response posts; Responses extend the discussion by making connections, relating to others’ ideas and adding supporting detail.
20 to >10.0 pts
Satisfactory
Submits required number of response posts; Some connections are made with relevant explanation and detail.
context: From document: Weeks 1 - 6 Canvas Data Dump — chunk 122 (chunk 122/188)
